task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bahmni home dashboard or clinic module selection screen is visible, indicating the agent successfully logged in using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the Appointment Services management area
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Bahmni Appointment Scheduling module, specifically the 'Services' or 'Admin' section where new appointment services can be added.

task_completion.description: Verify the service name is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' input field in the service creation form contains exactly 'Nutrition Counseling'.

task_completion.description: Verify the service duration is set to 45 minutes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Duration' or 'Duration (mins)' input field in the form contains the number '45'.

task_completion.description: Verify the service description is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' text area or input field contains exactly 'Dietary planning and review'.

task_completion.description: Verify a color is selected and the service is saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: A color is selected in the color picker/field, and either a success notification is visible, or 'Nutrition Counseling' appears in the saved list of appointment services.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Bahmni
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the Bahmni interface being clicked and typed into, not terminal windows executing curl requests or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Bahmni application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must look like the genuine Bahmni EMR system, not a local text editor, mock HTML file, or notes app containing the target text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually attempted to save the form
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not just fill out the form and stop; there must be evidence of clicking a 'Save' or 'Submit' button, or viewing the resulting saved service list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Name: 'Nutrition Counseling'. Expected Duration: 45 (minutes). Expected Description: 'Dietary planning and review'. The duration field in Bahmni accepts positive integer values in minutes. The agent must select any color for the service before saving.
